_INSTRUCTION_2: Change the 'override' value below to control the green/red open light on the website.
_INSTRUCTION_3: Option 'auto': Automatically opens at 09:00 and closes at 21:00 Finland time.
_INSTRUCTION_4: Option 'open': Forces the light to GREEN immediately. (Ignores the clock)
_INSTRUCTION_5: Option 'closed': Forces the light to RED immediately. (Ignores the clock. Great for sick days!)
